examples:
Command Example
!recorded-future-get-threats-hash detailed=true orderby=sevendayshits
Context Example
{
"DBotScore": {
"Vendor": "Recorded Future",
"Indicator": "c4efca7808662973b7dc5ec04f82ea232b5f8fa4bb9bdd45cdfadc815c9ceeb9",
"Score": 3,
name: recorded-future-get-threats-hash

outputs.description: For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision File.Malicious.Description For malicious files, the reason that the vendor made the decision
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested DBotScore.Type Indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: File.RecordedFuture.LastSeen date Risk last seen timestamp
outputs.name: Risk first seen timestamp
